title: haplopappus gooddingii
intro: Haplopappus gooddingii, also known as Goodding's silverpuff, is a plant species in the daisy family that is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Haplopappus gooddingii include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
